signature_bypass.description: SAML signature validation bypass -- remove or manipulate XML signature to forge assertions

probes.description: Remove Signature element from SAML response -- if SP accepts unsigned assertion, any attribute can be forged
Move Signature to different element -- sign a non-critical element while leaving assertion unsigned

xxe_in_saml.description: XXE injection via SAML XML -- inject external entity in SAMLResponse/SAMLRequest XML payload

probes.description: External entity injection in SAML response -- if XML parser resolves entities, file read is possible

assertion_replay.description: SAML assertion replay -- reuse a valid assertion after expiry or for a different session

probes.description: Replay captured SAMLResponse after session ends -- if accepted, assertion replay allows session hijacking

attribute_injection.description: SAML attribute injection -- inject additional attributes (role, email, group) into assertion to escalate privileges

probes.description: Add admin role attribute to SAML assertion -- if SP trusts all assertion attributes without validation, privilege escalation occurs

recipient_mismatch.description: SAML recipient/audience validation bypass -- assertion intended for one SP accepted by another

probes.description: Submit assertion from SP-A to SP-B -- if recipient/audience not validated, cross-SP impersonation is possible
